description: Echoe Media 存储优化与动态临时链接 - 存储 storageKey 到数据库，所有返回 media URL 的地方调用 generateAccessUrl 生成临时链接

userStories.title: Add storageKey field to database
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to store media file storageKey in the database for dynamic URL generation.
acceptanceCriteria: Add storageKey column to echoe_media table (VARCHAR 500)

userStories.title: Modify uploadMedia to save storageKey
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to save storageKey to database when uploading media files.
acceptanceCriteria: uploadMedia method saves storageKey to database
Keep existing URL generation logic (return URL on upload)

userStories.title: Modify listMedia to return dynamic temp links
userStories.description: As a user, I want to get dynamically generated temp access URLs in the media list.
acceptanceCriteria: listMedia calls generateAccessUrl for each record
Response includes dynamically generated url field

userStories.title: Modify getMedia to return dynamic temp links
userStories.description: As a developer, I need getMedia to also use dynamic URL generation.
acceptanceCriteria: getMedia method generates temp access URL on return

userStories.title: Check and update all APIs returning media URLs
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to ensure all places returning media URLs use dynamic generation.
acceptanceCriteria: Search codebase for all media URL return points
Identify which need dynamic URL generation
